root_cause_chain: The trajectory contains only 1 step, a synthetic diagnostic artifact with status error and message "replaced by a newer turn".
No real agent turn completed successfully; every generated turn was replaced by a retry mechanism before execution.
The agent never reached the web browsing stage to access the target URL.
Root cause: the run was aborted at the infrastructure level before any meaningful agent interaction.

critical_decision_points.decision: A synthetic turn was retained because the original turn was replaced by a newer turn before completion.
critical_decision_points.should_have: The framework should have allowed at least one turn to complete normally, executing browser tool calls to fulfill the task.

correct_strategy: Re-run with a stable agent environment that ensures the initial turn is not preempted. Verify the target URL is reachable and the agent has a browser tool configured.

stage_labels.reasoning: Step 1 is a synthetic turn replaced before completion. It carries no agent logic, tool calls, or content extraction. It is purely an infrastructure artifact and unhelpful for task progress.

summary: This trajectory failed immediately at the infrastructure level. The sole recorded step is a synthetic placeholder indicating the agent turn was preempted. No substantive agent behavior exists. A new stable run is required.
